notes: Basic 2LP into Ball Spin confirm. Easily done by just mashing 2LP. Decent damage and a knockdown, even if they block you're doing Ball Spin on block which is great. Just be sure to cancel with PPP so you can get oki.

Punish with 2HP into HP Ball Spin. Do this as 2HP, piano MP~LP~MP~HP, and you should get HP Ball Spin consistently. Technically you can do this after a j.HP/j.HK but it requires a very deep hit or counterhit, reserve that for stun combos or jumped fireballs and use the 2LP combo for jump-ins normally.
In the corner, 623LK is fast enough to combo from 2HP at any range. Solid punishment combo that does very respectable stun.
Similar to the above combo, but only works if 2HP hits point blank. Wider characters and crouching make the range a bit more forgiving.

Simple confirm into super. You can also do this as 2LP > 2LP if 5LK is too far out to hit, but the cancel is a bit harder. This is easily done as 2LP > 236LK > 63214P. Damage values recorded with the high damage flop ender, will do either that much damage or less. Level 3 version does the same damage always.
Heavy punish into super. You can cancel into super a little later than you think to make it easier to do this. Useful as a punish. Damage values recorded with the high damage flop ender.

Massive damage level 2 cancel. Expensive but very worth it, turns Chang's punishes from lackluster to above average. Cancel into the level 1 super on the 13th hit of the level 2, or the 15th hit overall.
Heavy punish into level 2 cancel. Almost 10k damage, very scary combo. Same as above, cancel on the 13th hit of level 1, or 14th hit overall.
